visual_description: In a dimly lit office or control room, two men in white shirts and ties stand facing each other. The man on the left, wearing a striped tie, suddenly raises his right arm and strikes the man on the right in the chest. The man on the right is visibly startled by the blow, his body recoiling from the impact.
audio_description: A sharp, percussive sound of a physical impact is heard, followed by a brief, low exhalation from the person who was struck.
